title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Oden, Luffy as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
scene: Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: He touched us all on his own....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Fool!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What are you doing, Sir Luffy- Taro!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...what "devastation"....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What "over- welcoming power"...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Some- thing like this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Has no effect at all!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't lie!! Get away from them right now, Luffy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All the Samurai that I've met are incredibly strong...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But you guys...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: HAVE BEEN COMPLETELY BROKEN...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is what you call a "normal daily life"!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is doing every little thing they say... and receiving Dango as a "reward" what you would call "normal"?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Wake up already!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You're all just slaves!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like big bro and the others are safe...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Is he!? He looks kind of sick...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does that guy have a screw loose or some- thing....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Who cares if I'm an out- slider!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are out- sides not allowed to protect this country!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I made a promise...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to my friend, Tama, in Kuri... who gave me food!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I told her I'd make sure nobody would have to worry about food in this country ever again!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Big bro...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll make sure that by the time we leave this country...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll be a place where you can eat until you're full every day!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I fail to do that, this place will continue to be a living hell!!

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: I've heard all about Oden!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He sounds like he was an amazing guy!! But when he was killed by Kaido 20 years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: This country stopped moving, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We're here...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: To defeat Kaido!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon Liberation storyline with 32 dialogue beats. Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
